Creates an event message issue.

## Import

```ts
import { eventMessageIssue } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```

## Signature

```ts
function eventMessageIssue(value: unknown): DataIssue | undefined
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns

The event message issue result.

```ts
import { eventMessageIssue } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```
